children.heading: Purpose
children.label: a Purpose
children.text: The purpose of this section is to ensure compilation and public disclosure of data to assess and hold the Department of Agriculture accountable for the nondiscriminatory participation of socially disadvantaged farmers and ranchers in programs of the Department.

children.heading: Definition of socially disadvantaged farmer or rancher
children.label: b Definition of socially disadvantaged farmer or rancher
children.text: In this section, the term “socially disadvantaged farmer or rancher” has the meaning given the term in .section 2003(e) of this title

children.heading: Compilation of program participation data
children.label: c Compilation of program participation data
A
children.text: raw numbers of applicants and participants by race, ethnicity, and gender, subject to appropriate privacy protections, as determined by the Secretary; and

children.label: B
children.text: the application and participation rate, by race, ethnicity, and gender, as a percentage of the total participation rate of all agricultural producers and landowners.

children.heading: Authority to collect data
children.label: 2 Authority to collect data
children.text: The heads of the agencies of the Department of Agriculture shall collect and transmit to the Secretary any data, including data on race, gender, and ethnicity, that the Secretary determines to be necessary to carry out paragraph (1).

children.heading: Public availability of report
children.label: 4 Public availability of report
children.text: The Secretary shall maintain and make readily available to the public, via website and otherwise in electronic and paper form, the report described in paragraph (3).

children.heading: Limitations on use of data
children.label: d Limitations on use of data

children.heading: Privacy protections
children.label: 1 Privacy protections
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall not disclose the names or individual data of any program participant.

children.heading: Authorized uses
children.label: 2 Authorized uses
children.text: The data under this section shall be used exclusively for the purposes described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 3 Limitation
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the data under this section shall not be used for the evaluation of individual applications for assistance.

children.heading: Receipt for service or denial of service
children.label: e Receipt for service or denial of service

children.text: the date, place, and subject of the request; and
the action taken, not taken, or recommended to the producer or landowner.
